commit.message: HDFS-16671. RBF: RouterRpcFairnessPolicyController supports configurable permit acquire timeout (#4597)

verification.payload:
tree 31ffc80253bf982bab855600d013cf7e60fa4835
parent a5adc27c99ffa0ee4f274276afd38f0e7367b9d2
author xuzq <15040255127@163.com> 1658994173 +0800
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1658994173 +0800

HDFS-16671. RBF: RouterRpcFairnessPolicyController supports configurable permit acquire timeout (#4597)

files.patch:
@@ -723,6 +723,14 @@
     </description>
   </property>
 
+  <property>
+    <name>dfs.federation.router.fairness.acquire.timeout</name>
+    <value>1s</value>
+    <description>
+      The maximum time to wait for a permit.
+    </description>
+  </property>
+
   <property>
     <name>dfs.federation.router.federation.rename.bandwidth</name>
     <value>10</value>
